$description: Good Transformer brand tokens - single source of truth for colours, typography, and spacing. Last updated 2026.

color._note: All hex values are the canonical references. RGB triplets are used in CSS custom properties for alpha compositing. The Tailwind alias is the class prefix used in the codebase.

ink.use: Main headlines, body copy, primary text - the default text colour on light surfaces

line.use: Dividers, hairlines, subtle borders. Applied at 14% opacity via Tailwind (border-line)

paper.use: Primary light surface, cards, section backgrounds

sand.use: Alternate light surface, slightly deeper than paper

mist.use: Subtle borders, muted dividers, faint overlays

glow.use: Warm highlight, near-white surfaces that need warmth. Applied at 70% opacity via Tailwind

teal_primary.use: Main accent - 'AI' word highlight, CTA borders, icon rings, active states, primary buttons
teal_primary._naming_note: The Tailwind alias is 'brass' for legacy reasons. All teal accent usage goes through bg-brass / text-brass / border-brass

teal_deep.use: Teal on smaller text where primary teal lacks contrast; hover states; pressed states

teal_bright.use: Arrows, fine divider rules, small icon strokes, subtle animated lines

teal_wash.use: Very light teal tint - badge backgrounds, subtle highlights. Never a large fill

soft_blue.use: Section band backgrounds where a light cool-neutral is needed (e.g. the role/services intro section on home)

warm_amber.use: Illustration details, diagram labels only. Never buttons, borders, or text

copper.use: Form interactions on personal booking flow, secondary icon colour, muted UI chrome

dark_card.use: Dark CTA panels and current dark hero route card - near-black with warm dark-teal undertone

dark_bg.use: Full dark backgrounds if ever needed

brass_old._warning: RETIRED - do not use. The old warm brass accent. Replace with teal_primary (#008C95) in all contexts

body_background.use: Primary site body and homepage header/hero surface

hero_background.use: Homepage hero and header background; must match the hero stack asset background exactly

warm_paper_section.use: Content sections needing a warm paper band (Patrick bio section, editorial bands)

font_serif.use: Headlines (h1–h3), blockquotes, display text - editorial and premium

font_sans.use: Body copy, UI labels, navigation, captions - default body font

accessibility.rule: Use #008C95 for teal accents at 18px+ or bold. Use #006F7A for teal body text or small labels
